NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-28-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206

JUDGE BENSON, LGARBER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 9:20 AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, ARNOLD EVJE II FOR PLTF. DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS CONTAINED IN A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP. SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES AND SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEYS, GARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL STREET, #621, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
